visual_mood: Premium studio catalog shot -- two Rasta models side by side, hero + supporting cast, warm dark backdrop

layout.composition: Rasta Brown as hero (30% larger, foreground center-left). Rasta Red as supporting (slightly behind, center-right). Both at identical 3/4 angle. Series header at top. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Series header largest, subtitle medium, logo small
layout.background: Dark warm charcoal with subtle amber ambient light

product.placement: Both at identical 3/4 angle on a dark surface. Rasta Brown as hero -- 30% larger, foreground center-left. Rasta Red as supporting -- slightly behind, center-right. Both cast consistent shadows from the same overhead light onto the dark surface.
product.instruction: Both sunglasses must look like real pairs photographed together in the same studio setup -- matching the styles shown in the reference images. Same angle, same scale relationship, same lighting. Not composited.

brand.color_scheme: Dark warm charcoal background with subtle amber studio highlights, white headline text, light warm gray subtitle

prompt: A premium studio product photograph of two pairs of sunglasses on a dark warm charcoal surface, everything part of one cohesive shot with consistent overhead studio lighting and subtle amber warmth. Rasta Brown sunglasses from DuberyMNL in the foreground center-left as the hero, 30% larger -- real matte sunglasses matching the reference. Rasta Red slightly behind at center-right as supporting, same exact 3/4 angle and same lighting. Both cast matching soft shadows onto the surface. All text uses the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. White headline 'THE RASTA SERIES' at top, subtitle 'Bold style. Real protection.' below in warm gray. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, catalog feel.
